name: search_flights
description: Search available airline flights between two airports on a date. Returns a numbered list of offers with airline, stops, and total price. Call this once you know origin, destination, and departure date.

parameters.name: origin
parameters.description: Origin IATA airport code, e.g. JFK

parameters.name: destination
parameters.description: Destination IATA airport code, e.g. LAX

parameters.name: return_date
parameters.description: Return date YYYY-MM-DD for round trips; omit for one-way

parameters.name: cabin
parameters.description: Cabin: Y economy, C business, F first

parameters.name: session_id
parameters.description: The session id provided at the start of the conversation; pass it on every tool call

name: offer_details
description: Get the full itinerary detail for one offer from the most recent search, by its offer number.

parameters.name: offer_id
parameters.description: Offer number from the search results, e.g. 0, 1, 2

name: book_flight
description: Book a chosen flight offer and create a reservation (test PNR). Only call after the caller has picked an offer, given their name, and confirmed. Returns a confirmation record locator.

name: search_hotels
description: Search available hotels in a city for a check-in/check-out date range. Returns a numbered list of offers with hotel name, star rating, room type, nightly rate, and total price. Call this once you know the city, check-in date, and check-out date.

parameters.name: city
parameters.description: City name or city/airport code where the hotel should be, e.g. San Francisco or SFO

parameters.name: session_id
parameters.description: The conversation session id; pass it on every tool call

name: book_hotel
description: Book a chosen hotel offer from the most recent hotel search and create a reservation (test confirmation). Only call after the caller has picked an offer by its number, given their name, and confirmed. Returns a confirmation number.

parameters.name: offer_id
parameters.description: Hotel offer number the caller chose, e.g. 0, 1, 2

name: search_cars
description: Search available rental cars at a pickup location for a pickup/drop-off date range. Returns a numbered list of offers with rental company, car type, transmission, daily rate, and total price. Call this once you know the pickup location, pickup date, and drop-off date.

parameters.name: pickup_location
parameters.description: Pickup location city or airport code, e.g. SFO

parameters.name: session_id
parameters.description: The conversation session id; pass it on every tool call

name: book_car
description: Book a chosen rental-car offer from the most recent car search and create a reservation (test confirmation). Only call after the caller has picked an offer by its number, given their name, and confirmed. Returns a confirmation number.

parameters.name: offer_id
parameters.description: Car offer number the caller chose, e.g. 0, 1, 2
